results.title: Main menu renders with title and Start Game

visual.lookFor: ROGUE HEROES title logo and a prominent Start Game button on a clean menu background
visual.verdictNote: ROGUE HEROES title + Start Game button on clean menu bg.

results.title: Deploy screen offers maps, a live preview, modes and difficulty

visual.lookFor: a list of battlefields, a top-down map PREVIEW image, mode cards, and difficulty cards
visual.verdictNote: 6 battlefields, top-down preview, 3 modes, 3 difficulties all visible.

results.title: Battle starts in command phase, turn 1, with no units fielded
The 3D battlefield actually renders (canvas is painted)

visual.lookFor: a 3D battlefield with terrain, the player base, and the HUD command bar — not a black frame
visual.verdictNote: 3D battlefield with terrain + base + HUD renders (not black).

results.title: Deploying a Recruit adds a field unit and spends money + the base CP

visual.lookFor: a newly deployed infantry unit standing next to the player Home Base
visual.verdictNote: Deployed Recruit is hidden behind the auto-opened base command deck; no clean view of the unit next to the base. Capture must frame it with the deck closed.

results.title: Researching a doctrine unlocks it on the base
A resolved attack reduces an enemy part's health

visual.lookFor: projectiles in flight and/or impact effects between units during the resolve phase
visual.verdictNote: No projectile streak or impact effect visible in the resolve frame — capture caught a quiet frame; combatants also appear far apart. Improve capture timing and/or projectile visibility.

results.title: Eliminating the enemy transitions to a victory end-state with a reward

visual.lookFor: a Victory end screen overlaying the battlefield
visual.verdictNote: VICTORY card with Play Again / Main Menu and +110 points toast.

results.title: Selecting Move shows the unit's movement-range ring

visual.lookFor: a cyan circular movement-range ring drawn on the ground around the selected unit
visual.verdictNote: Circular movement-range ring is drawn on the ground around the selected recruit (a touch faint, but present and readable).

results.title: Explosive ground-aim previews a blast-radius the unit can reach

visual.lookFor: a blast-radius ring drawn at a ground spot for an explosive unit's targeting, with the arc/landing marker
visual.verdictNote: Only the grenade throw-range circle is visible; no distinct blast-radius ring + arc/landing marker at the aimed ground spot. Needs a clearer blast preview and a sensible hover point.

results.title: Building a defense shows a placement-range ring near the base

visual.lookFor: a green placement-range ring around the Home Base while a turret/wall is being placed
visual.verdictNote: Green placement-range ring around the base plus a clear 'click inside the green ring' instruction.

results.title: The HUD shows the current objective and the turn number

visual.lookFor: an objective/mode chip and a visible turn/round indicator in the HUD
visual.verdictNote: At battle start the base deck is auto-open and covers the HUD; the objective/mode chip and turn indicator are not cleanly visible. Capture a deselected, unobstructed battle-start frame.

results.title: A destroyed enemy part is shown at 0 HP, not hidden

visual.lookFor: the inspected enemy's parts list still listing the destroyed part, shown at 0 / empty health
visual.verdictNote: Inspect-detail does not list the destroyed enemy part at all (destroyedPartListed=false) — matches the known gap; must show it at 0 HP.

results.title: The end screen lets the player return to the main menu

visual.lookFor: a control on the victory screen that returns to the main menu (e.g. a Main Menu / Continue button)
visual.verdictNote: Victory screen has a Main Menu button (and Play Again).
